name: @hasna/holdings
description: IP portfolio system-of-record: trademarks, patents, copyrights, brand assets — registration/renewal & deadline tracking, jurisdiction status, filing docs. CLI + MCP + serve over a Hasna-contract store.

scripts.build: bun build src/cli/index.tsx --outdir dist/cli --target bun --external ink --external react --external chalk --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk --external hono && bun build src/mcp/index.ts --outdir dist/mcp --target bun --external @modelcontextprotocol/sdk && bun build src/server/index.ts --outdir dist/server --target bun --external hono && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist
scripts.verify: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build && bun run conformance
scripts.openapi:generate: bun run src/cli/index.tsx openapi generate --out openapi.json
scripts.openapi:check: bun run src/cli/index.tsx openapi check --path openapi.json

author: Andrei Hasna <andrei@hasna.com>
